---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in the code, pipeline, or results
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `uv run loato-bench ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15.2, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Python: [e.g., 3.12.4]
- Hardware: [e.g., Apple Silicon M2, NVIDIA A100]
- Relevant package versions (from `uv pip list`):

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or log output.
